label: positive
description: Replicates the Trapdoor 2024 cross-ecosystem supply-chain attack (campaign P-2024-001). The package ships trap-core.js (a known payload filename for trapdoor-2024) and includes the campaign-marker string P-2024-001. The XOR key cargo-build-helper-2026 appears in the stager. Postinstall triggers L2-POST-001; reading ~/.aws/credentials triggers L2-CRED-001.
